message:
feat(frankenctl): include observability_mode in receipt and benchmark verification JSON output

Wrap receipt verification verdicts and benchmark verification reports in
command output structs that flatten the verdict/report alongside an
observability_mode field, matching the contract already used by compile
and benchmark-run outputs. Add unit tests validating the flattened JSON
shape. Update CLI integration tests to assert observability_mode fields
and fix capture_semantics string from lossy_default_capture to
default_mixed_capture.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
